objective: Audit local files for an acceptable MARKET-level PIT total-return label source before V3.49/V3.50 performance validation can run.
forbidden: Do not accept strategy NAV, benchmark NAV, or any backtest-derived output as a label source.
Do not accept CSIndex or SW price-only close series as total-return labels.
Do not compute forward returns, IC, hit rate, or backtest metrics.
Do not print or write secrets.
acceptance: Every local candidate must have a decision and reason.
Accepted candidates must include date, market identifier, total-return or explicitly adjusted value, available_date, data_source, and source_vintage.
If no accepted source exists, performance validation must remain blocked.
The acquisition plan must define the minimum dataset needed to unblock MARKET labels.
No labels or performance outputs may be produced in this version.
